# ContactProviderExtension

**Protocol**

The protocol your app extension implements, which provides contact items to the system-wide Contacts ecosystem.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol ContactProviderExtension : ContactItemEnumerating, AppExtension
```

## Overview

For the system to recognize your app extension, use the following identifier in the extension’s `Info.plist` file:

```swift
<key>EXAppExtensionAttributes</key>
<dict>
    <key>EXExtensionPointIdentifier</key>
    <string>com.apple.contact.provider.extension</string>
</dict>
```

Installing the host app installs your extension, but the system won’t run the extension until the extension domain is enabled. When the extension runs, the system first calls the extension’s [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactProviderExtension/configure(for:)] method. Then you set up the enumerator that provides contact items from your data store.

The following shows a basic implementation of a `ContactProviderExtension`. Because `ContactProviderExtension` inherits from [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemEnumerating] the implementation also implements [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemEnumerating/enumerator(for:)] which returns a [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemEnumerator] on demand. In this example, the extension sets up a `RootContainerEnumerator` to provide its contact items; see the [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactItemEnumerator] discussion for details of how `RootContainerEnumerator` works.

```swift
import ContactProvider

@main
class ExtensionExample: ContactProviderExtension {
    private let rootContainerEnumerator: RootContainerEnumerator
    
    required init() {
        rootContainerEnumerator = RootContainerEnumerator()
    }
    
    func configure(for domain: ContactProviderDomain) {
        rootContainerEnumerator.configure(for: domain)
    }
    
    func enumerator(for collection: ContactItem.Identifier) -> any ContactItemEnumerator {
        return rootContainerEnumerator
    }

    func invalidate() async {
        // Stop the enumeration and clean up, in preparation for the extension to terminate.
    }
}
```

## Configuring an extension

- **configure(for:)**: Configures the extension instance for a domain.

## Managing the extension life cycle

- **invalidate()**: Invalidates the extension.

## Inherits From

- AppExtension
- ContactItemEnumerating
